languages.text: Until the end of the turn, the user gains +2 resolve for each critical hit they scored if they have an augment in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of the turn, the user gains +2 resolve for each critical hit they scored if they have an augment in the cortical insertion.

languages.text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

Until the end of their turn, the user gains +2 resolve for each critical hit scored if they have an augment in the cortical insertion.

languages.text: Совершая {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g}, персонаж каждый раз получает +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимости{/g} до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, если у него есть {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}аугмент{/g} в кортикальной инсерции.

traits.locale_text: Совершая {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g}, персонаж каждый раз получает +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимости{/g} до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, если у него есть {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} в кортикальной инсерции.

Совершая {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g}, персонаж каждый раз получает +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимости{/g} до конца своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, если у него есть {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} в кортикальной инсерции.

languages.text: Der Nutzer erhält bis zum Ende seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} für jeden erzielten {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g}, wenn er eine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentation{/g} im kortikalen Einsatz hat.
languages.original_text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer erhält bis zum Ende seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} für jeden erzielten {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g}, wenn er eine {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}Augmentation{/g} im kortikalen Einsatz hat.

languages.text: Hasta el final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario obtiene +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} por cada {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g} realizado si tiene un {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}aumento{/g} en el injerto cortical.
languages.original_text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario obtiene +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} por cada {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g} realizado si tiene un {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}aumento{/g} en el injerto cortical.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, kortikal eklenti yuvasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}ogment{/g} takılıysa yaptığı her {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} için +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri kazanır. Bu etki, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, kortikal eklenti yuvasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}ogment{/g} takılıysa yaptığı her {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} için +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri kazanır. Bu etki, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text: 若使用者在皮层植入槽位拥有{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}植入物{/g}，使用者每成功{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}一次，获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}，效果持续至其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。
languages.original_text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: 若使用者在皮层植入槽位拥有{g|Encyclopedia:Augment}植入物{/g}，使用者每成功{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}一次，获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}，效果持续至其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。

languages.text: Jusqu'à la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, l'utilisateur gagne +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} pour chaque {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g} asséné ou s'il a une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augmentation{/g} dans l'insertion corticale.
languages.original_text: Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} for each {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} scored if they have an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in the cortical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Jusqu'à la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, l'utilisateur gagne +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} pour chaque {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g} asséné ou s'il a une {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augmentation{/g} dans l'insertion corticale.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了まで、脳内への{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}増幅{/g}があれば、{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}が1つでも決まれば、{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}決意{/g}が+2上昇する。
